race.comment: WOOTTON PLEASE (11) improving with racing and looks ready for this trip fourth-up. Sat on the speed in the heavy going and never surrendered when third over 1262m at this track. Stalks the speed and will prove hard to hold out. DANCING TILDA (2) nailed late over this track and trip in the heavy going with a close third on May 12. Will relish the claim and prove hard to catch. MICROGRAVITY (3) nice type ready to win. Savaged the line again from midfield with a handy second over 1450m at Quirindi. Luke Rolls retains the ride and anticipating another big run. The chances don't end there. FASHION SPREE (7) deep into the campaign and worth thought after finishing fourth over 1262m here. Ready for this trip and place claims look best.
